---
title: "Modules"
listing:
  - id: modules-list
    contents:
      - modules/module-introduction.qmd
      - modules/module-fieldwork.qmd
      - modules/module-postprocessing.qmd
      - modules/module-hr-analysis.qmd
      - modules/gis-reproducible-research.qmd
    type: custom
    template: "_templates/modules-index-cards.ejs.md"
---

::: {#modules-list}
:::
